The '''''Delaya''-class courier''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] courier starship developed circa [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. It was designed and built by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]] while the company was owned by [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]. The ship was popularized due to its use by [[Arca Jeth]] and his own Delaya-Class courier, known as [[SunGem]]. Their fame led to other Jedi acquiring the same class of ship, and eventually for [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive]] to create the [[Valya-Class Courier|Vanya-Class Courier]] based on its design and [[Jedi courier|purpose]] for use by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. 

==Characteristics==
[[File:Sungem_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''[[SunGem]]'' [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

The ''Delaya''-class [[Courier/Legends|courier]] was designed to match a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] for speed and maneuverability. Unlike [[Corellia StarDrive]]'s [[Coruscant-class Heavy Courier|''Coruscant''-class Heavy Courier]], most of the ship was habitable. The complex automatic systems integrated into the craft allowed it to be operated by a single person.

This aerodynamic starship had an insectoid appearance and featured 21 [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|HKD]] [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]]. These engines were set in blocks of three on servo-controlled mountings to negate the need for maneuvering thrusters. The courier was also lightly armed with only 2 rotating [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and 1 [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher. For further agility, a computer system controlled multiple layers of extendable vanes and aerofoils . This ensured that the courier had a good aerodynamic shape during atmospheric travel.
